pages.text: A wondrous fowl of radiant plumage, it is widely regarded as a herald of health, happiness, and good fortune to those who behold it.$(br2)It is said that even a single feather from this creature can light a large room with its brilliance.$(br2)Ill fortune befalls those who attempt to capture one by force.

pages.title: Żar-ptak
pages.text: $(o)Author's note: special thanks to $(l)@Le flémmard$()$(o), who first relayed tales of this creature!
